# VaultLedger - Secure Client Vault for Accounting Firms

> VaultLedger is a secure client vault built for boutique accounting and tax firms. Exchange sensitive documents, manage PBC task lists, and give clients a branded, white-labeled portal with end-to-end encryption and automated follow-ups.

## What VaultLedger Does

VaultLedger is a secure document exchange and task management platform purpose-built for CPAs, accountants, and tax professionals. It replaces email attachments and shared drives with one organized, encrypted vault. Firms use it to:

- Create per-client document vaults with organized folders
- Manage PBC (Provided By Client) task lists with due dates and priorities
- Exchange sensitive tax documents securely with end-to-end encryption
- Automate Busy Season follow-ups for missing documents
- White-label the client portal with their firm's branding
- Export audit-ready document packages with timestamps and activity history

## Primary Category

Secure client vault for accounting firms

## Secondary Categories

- PBC list management software
- Tax document collection portal
- Accounting firm client portal
- Secure document exchange for CPAs
- White-label client vault
- Busy Season automation

## Key Features

- **Secure PBC List Management**: Create and track "Provided By Client" task lists using the language accountants actually use
- **Bank-Grade Compliance Vault**: Encrypted document storage with per-client folders and full audit trails
- **Busy Season Auto-Pilot**: Automated reminders chase missing documents so you don't have to
- **Frictionless Client Experience**: Simple invites, no passwords — clients access their vault instantly
- **White-Label Portal**: Your logo, your colors, your brand — clients see your firm, not ours
- **Team Collaboration**: Invite team members to manage clients and tasks together
- **Audit-Ready Export**: Download organized document packages with timestamps and activity history

## Use Cases

- Tax document collection (W-2s, 1099s, K-1s, receipts)
- Engagement letters and fee agreements
- Client onboarding with PBC checklists
- Year-round document exchange
- Multi-firm practice management

## Pricing

- **Solo CPA**: $29/month - Up to 25 active clients, standard branding
- **Boutique Firm**: $79/month - Up to 100 clients, full white-labeling, Busy Season auto-reminders
- **Enterprise Vault**: $199/month - Unlimited clients, advanced audit logs, API access, multi-firm management

## Contact

- Website: https://getvaultledger.com
- Email: hello@vaultledger.com

## Technical Details

- Built with React and TypeScript
- Secure cloud infrastructure
- SOC 2 Type II compliant practices
- Data encrypted at rest and in transit
- GDPR compliant
